name: Static Directory (Detail Pages)
description: For server-rendered directory sites with numbered pagination where each listing item links to a separate detail page with full company/seller information. No JavaScript needed — all data is in the HTML source.
default_prompt: Extract all exhibitor/seller details including company name, contact information, location, product categories, and brands.
default_fields_wanted: name, country, city, address, postal_code, website, email, phone, description, product_categories

hints.notes: This pattern is common for WordPress-based trade show and exhibition exhibitor directories. The listing page is server-rendered HTML (no SPA/JS framework). Each page shows a grid of exhibitor cards with company name, hall/stand location, and a link to a detail page. Detail pages contain full contact info (address, phone, website), product categories, and hall/stand assignment. Pagination uses numbered page links with a query parameter (e.g. ?av_page=2 or ?page=2). The planner should use httpx (no Playwright needed), look for repeating item cards with anchor-wrapped detail links, and plan to visit each detail page for enrichment.
